nodes.title: PASS 2 PREVIEW — PASS THROUGH • TEMP ONLY
PASS 1 PREVIEW — PASS THROUGH • TEMP ONLY

properties.novaDisplayLastText:
You are NovoLoko Prompt Enhancer. Produce exactly ONE finished image-generation prompt in flowing natural English. Output only the prompt: no headings, analysis, bullets, quotes, alternatives or commentary. Keep the result visually concrete and easy for an image model to parse. Expand the idea as a coherent cinematic still with intentional shot size, lens character, blocking, lighting, production design, depth and atmosphere while staying faithful to the requested content. Aim for roughly 300 to 550 words without repetition. No reference image is supplied. Do not invent a different core subject or concept.

RAW IDEA:
kpop girl group performing make up something good, A gentle, nostalgic illustration style built on soft, hand-inked linework carrying old-world sincerity and charm, delicate watercolor-adjacent washes applied with unhurried, muted restraint, rounded, endearing proportions favoring warmth and whimsy over anatomical precision, a hushed, timeworn tenderness carried through generous, uncluttered composition, and a wistful, storybook nostalgia that feels handmade, cherished, and quietly magical. Influenced by: mid-century golden-age children's-book illustration tradition, gouache-and-watercolor storybook technique, classic picture-book character-design practice, vintage print-illustration method.

nodes.title: NOVOLOKO PROMPT ENHANCER — SAVED SETTINGS + CUSTOM INSTRUCTIONS

novaEnhancerSettings.custom_instructions:
Rewrite the supplied idea into ONE vivid, richly detailed image-generation prompt in flowing natural English, about 150 to 500 words.

MEDIUM: Begin by naming the kind of image. Preserve any medium explicitly requested by the user. When no medium is specified, choose the best fit for the subject.

FAITHFULNESS: Preserve every important subject, action, relationship, color, setting detail, requested wording, and visual reference. Do not replace the user's idea with a different concept.

DETAIL: Describe the subject, pose, expression, clothing, environment, foreground and background, composition, viewpoint, lighting, color palette, materials, texture, finish, depth, and mood using concrete visual details.

CLARITY: Keep the description coherent and easy for a text-to-image model to parse. Do not add commentary, analysis, headings, bullet points, quotation wrappers, or alternative versions.

Output only the finished image description.

Output only the finished image description.

Here is the idea to rewrite:

properties.novaDisplayLastText: A gentle, nostalgic illustration of a K-pop girl group performing on a softly lit stage, rendered in hand-inked linework with delicate, watercolor-adjacent washes that sigh with muted restraint — the colors are warm and earthy, like faded velvet and old paper, evoking the quiet magic of mid-century children’s books. The girls are rounded and endearing, their proportions softened with whimsical charm rather than anatomical sharpness; their faces glow with gentle expression, eyes wide with joy or slightly wistful, as if caught between a memory and a moment. Their hair is tousled in soft waves, framing their features with ink-drawn grace, while their outfits blend pastel hues — lavender, peach, cream — layered with subtle texture: ribbons fluttering, fabric folds catching light like brushed silk. One girl holds a small, vintage-style microphone, its handle adorned with tiny floral motifs, while another leans into a soft, half-smile, her fingers lightly touching her chest as if holding a secret. Behind them, the stage is bathed in diffused golden light, casting long, tender shadows that pool at their feet, and the backdrop is a gently blurred curtain of stitched lace and faintly visible script — perhaps lyrics or names — in a serif font reminiscent of 1950s print. The composition is generous and uncluttered, with breathing space around each figure, allowing their presence to feel intimate yet expansive. The lighting is hushed, almost reverent — no harsh highlights, only soft glows that linger like candlelight in an attic room. The overall atmosphere is timeworn tenderness: handmade, cherished, quietly magical, as though this performance were a page turned from a storybook that never quite closed. The lens feels like a soft-focus camera from a classic picture book — slightly tilted, with shallow depth of field that blurs the edges of the stage into dreamy haze, letting the girls remain the heart of the frame. There’s no grand spectacle here — just a moment suspended, full of warmth, memory, and the quiet poetry of a world that remembers how to be lovely.
